query:
SELECT l.id, l.companyName, l.websiteUrl, l.contactEmail, a.summary, a.prestigeScore, a.detailedReport 
FROM leads l 
LEFT JOIN audits a ON l.id = a.leadId 
WHERE l.id = 360018 
LIMIT 1;
command:
